title: Unforgettable trek
text: Spectacular scenery and professional guides. Highly recommended!

title: Great experience
text: Well organized but some lodges were basic.

title: Challenging but rewarding
text: Manaslu was tough but the views were worth it.

title: Decent trek
text: Mardi Himal was nice but not as spectacular as expected.

title: Amazing trek with Sherpa Steps
text: Gokyo Lakes was breathtaking and the guides were fantastic.

title: Great trek but tough
text: Everest Base Camp was incredible but physically demanding.

title: Beautiful trek
text: Annapurna Circuit had stunning views and good organization.

title: Perfect family trek
text: Langtang was ideal for our family with kids. Safe and scenic.

title: Incredible experience
text: Manaslu was a once-in-a-lifetime trek. Highly recommend!
